title: Evidence & Resources
intro: This page brings together DESCF’s public materials, learning outputs, and selected documents related to current work and planned programme development.

items.title: Field Notes
items.summary: Short write-ups related to current work, field observations, and conservation communication.
items.body: A section for short notes tied to field practice, awareness work, and public-facing conservation communication.

items.title: Seminars and Talks
items.summary: Public sessions and discussion-based outputs related to wildlife, monitoring, amphibians, climate, and conservation planning.
items.body: Use this entry type for public sessions, event summaries, or discussion-oriented learning materials.

items.title: Briefs and Concept Notes
items.summary: Short documents outlining planned areas of development and possible programme directions.
items.body: Useful for concept notes, short planning documents, and programme briefs.

items.title: Media and Public References
items.summary: Selected interviews, mentions, and public-facing materials related to DESCF’s work.
items.body: Use this section for media mentions, interviews, and public references.

items.title: Introduction to Passive Acoustic Monitoring in Conservation
items.summary: A short introductory note on passive acoustic monitoring as a developing field method for wildlife observation and documentation.
items.body: A future-facing DESCF resource on monitoring, sound-based observation, and ecological documentation.

items.title: Why Anuran Bioacoustics Matters in Amphibian Monitoring
items.summary: A short note on frog and toad calls, wetland-linked observation, and the role of acoustic methods in amphibian-focused work.
items.body: A note focused on frog and toad calls, amphibian learning, and acoustic monitoring possibilities.

items.title: Wildlife Conservation and Climate Pressure in Bangladesh
items.summary: A brief discussion of how ecological change, seasonal pressure, and climate-related stress affect conservation planning.
items.body: A resource on how ecological change and climate-related pressures affect conservation planning in Bangladesh.

items.title: Public Awareness and Snake Conservation
items.summary: A short piece on public understanding, fear-driven harm, and the continued importance of communication in herpetofauna conservation.
items.body: A public-facing explainer about fear-driven harm, coexistence, and wildlife communication.

items.title: From Field Communication to Monitoring
items.summary: A short note on DESCF’s current work in awareness and its future direction in sound-based observation and monitoring.
items.body: A bridging note connecting current awareness work with future monitoring and sound-based observation.

items.title: Early Notes on Conservation-Linked Green Enterprise
items.summary: A short exploratory note on possible links between conservation work, sustainability, and enterprise development.
items.body: An exploratory note on sustainability, enterprise, and conservation-linked future pathways.
